summary: Adjusted the opening to avoid repeating chapter 10's temporal scaffold and sharpened the closing handoff so Silas's realization points more directly toward the wider naming pressure south of the cut.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin in the shop with Silas unwrapping his wrist instead of a matching 'By...' time construction.
Extended the final line so Junie's sign also cues the threat to the rough useful names beyond Ferrymouth.
